text:
LINE Stickers (LINEスタンプ, LINE Stamps) are digital stickers that can be purchased and used in conversations inside the LINE messenger app. There are currently five sets of stickers from Hunter × Hunter. The Shonen Jump 50th Anniversary Project released the fifth set of LINE stickers as well as other Weekly Shōnen Jump merchandise for the anniversary.

HUNTER×HUNTER is the first sticker set that was released on May 1st, 2014 by Nippon TV (日本テレビ, Nippon Terebi). The set contains 40 stickers and can be purchased for 250 Yen.

HUNTER×HUNTER PART 2 (HUNTER×HUNTER 第2弾) is the second sticker set that was released on September 18th, 2014 by Nippon TV (日本テレビ, Nippon Terebi). The set contains 40 stickers and can be purchased for 250 Yen.

ANIMATED! HUNTER×HUNTER (動く！HUNTER×HUNTER) is the third sticker set that was released on March 26th, 2015 by Nippon TV (日本テレビ, Nippon Terebi). The set contains 24 stickers and can be purchased for 250 Yen.

HUNTER×HUNTER (J50th) is the fifth sticker set that was released on November 11th, 2018 by the Shonen Jump 50th Anniversary Project (少年ジャンプ創刊50周年プロジェクト, Shōnen Janpu Sōkan 50 Shūnen Purojekuto). The set contains 40 stickers and can be purchased for 250 Yen.
